sourceContext.lead: Translated and adapted from Kamigame's Tanya guide.
sourceContext.citationText: Source page: Tanya Guide - Star Savior | Kamigame.

hero.title: Tanya
hero.summary: Tanya keeps the same speed and attack stat line but flexes her set package depending on whether you need raw damage or faster initiative. From there, move into the PvP pressure route once the core stat line is stable.

combatIdentity.title: Combat Identity
combatIdentity.summary: Tanya feels best once ATK%, Speed, and Crit Rate are online, giving the first rotation a much steadier payoff.
bullets: Main stats stay on Speed necklace and ATK% ring.
Substat focus: ATK%, Speed, Crit Rate, and Crit DMG.
Journey: Hard route leans toward DPS - AX5.

skillRotation.title: Skill Rotation
skillRotation.summary: Skill investment is cleanest as Ultimate >= Special >= Basic, with the first cooldown setting the pace for the full rotation.

steps.title: Open with Ultimate
steps.detail: Lead with the highest-invested cooldown so the opener starts on the strongest possible breakpoint.

steps.title: Cash in on Special
steps.detail: Special is usually the next meaningful breakpoint once the opener lands and should carry the mid-cycle payoff.

steps.title: Fill with Basic
steps.detail: Use Basic between cooldowns while you keep ATK% and Speed stable on gear.

steps.title: Upgrade toward the final target
steps.detail: Budget target is 3 / 6 / 6, with 7 / 8 / 7 as the long-term skill finish.

buildPlanner.title: Build Planner
buildPlanner.summary: Start on the Core line with Insight (4pc) + Valor (2pc) and Speed necklace and ATK% ring. Move into the PvP pressure route once the baseline is stable.

sets.label: Core
sets.note: Core keeps SPD on the necklace and ATK% on the ring.

sets.label: PvP pressure
sets.note: The current build includes a speed-heavy lane for PvP pressure and turn tempo.

priorities: Substats: ATK(%), SPD, Crit Rate, Crit DMG

targetStats.summary: Lock Speed necklace and ATK% ring, then stack ATK%, Speed, Crit Rate, and Crit DMG through substats.

upgradePath.title: Priority
items: Breakthrough priority: ★★☆ Strong gains from extra copies
Substat focus: ATK%, Speed, Crit Rate, and Crit DMG

journeyHard.title: Recommended Cards
journeyHard.summary: Core line: Lacy and Bunny Frey. Fill the remaining slots with Charlotte, Tanya or Bunny Claire, and Petra or Naru.

items.label: Passive
items.title: Demolition Work
items.summary: Tanya's passive matters more once the core stat line is online and the rotation is already stable.

items.label: Basic
items.title: Boom-Boom Tool
items.summary: Use the basic to bridge cooldowns; it should stay behind the two higher-impact skills in upgrade priority.

items.label: Special
items.title: Buzz-Buzz Chainsaw
items.summary: Special is the next major breakpoint after the opener and usually carries the mid-cycle payoff.

items.label: Ultimate
items.title: Bang-Bang Bunker
items.summary: Ultimate anchors the opener and stays at the top of the investment order for this build.
